allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/products" -Method Get; "Success: $\($r.data.Count\) products" } catch { "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/products" -Method Get; "OK: $\($r.data.Count\) products. First: $\($r.data[0].name\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\), ContentType: $\($resp.Headers['Content-Type']\)"; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/products" -UseBasicParsing; "API Status: $\($r2.StatusCode\)" } catch { $err = $_.Exception.Response; if \($err\) { $stream = $err.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); "API Error Body: $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/products" -Method Get; "OK: $\($r.data.Count\) products | First: $\($r.data[0].name\) - $\($r.data[0].brand\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($body = '{"email":"admin@humansport.com","password":"humansport2025"}'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/admin/auth/login" -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType "application/json"; "Login OK: token=$\($r.data.token.Substring\(0,20\)\)... user=$\($r.data.user.email\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
